records.source_claim: Central East Oakland: the draft LHMP estimates 9,476 people (9.0%) in high and 241 (0.2%) in very-high deep-seated landslide susceptibility areas.

limitations: Sub-area population exposure to susceptibility classes is not an address-level landslide finding.
The plan estimates population by multiplying exposed residential-building percentage by estimated population.
This is broader than the address-level CGS earthquake-induced-landslide layer.
